channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Blame AI? Used smartphone prices set to rise dramatically as new smartphone market expected to crash by 15% in 2026
item.description: Memory shortages are driving up smartphone prices worldwide, pushing consumers toward refurbished devices and creating new supply challenges.

item.title: Should I buy a Blink or Ring doorbell this Prime Day? Two big video doorbell brands compared
item.description: Video doorbells are seeing some huge price cuts right now — here's how to choose the right one for your home.

item.title: Steam Machine : Valve change tout pour la pré-commande, et cliquer vite ne suffit plus
item.description: Valve ouvre les pré-commandes de sa Steam Machine, ne favorise plus les utilisateurs les plus rapides : cette fois, c'est un tirage au sort qui décidera des premiers chanceux. Une réponse directe au fiasco du Steam Controller.

item.title: My ergonomic office chair's recline function failed and almost took me out — so that's why I'm eyeing these 3 gaming chairs as my next move
item.description: I wasn't expecting to be in the market for a new gaming chair this Prime Day, but here we are.

item.title: Underdog joy is the heart of this World Cup
item.description: Curaçao, Cape Verde, Haiti, Iran, DR Congo, Uzbekistan, and Egypt are giving the 2026 World Cup its best underdog stories

item.title: Quote of the day by Anduril CEO Palmer Luckey: 'There's no moral high ground in using inferior technology' — challenging the dominant narrative over AI use in defense
item.description: The ethics of AI usage matter less than using the best possible tools, according to Anduril CEO Palmer Luckey.

item.title: Were tuned into the best Prime Day headphones deals: Sony XM6 and AirPods Max 2 lead the pack so far
item.description: Find headphones on sale for Amazon Prime Day 2026. See our experts' favorite headphone deals, including Sony XM6, AirPods Max 2, and Anker Soundcore P30i.

item.title: Meta Pauses Employee-Tracking Program Following Internal Data Leak
item.description: The move comes after the company left potentially sensitive data from the initiative exposed internally.

item.title: Valve describes just how brutal RAM negotiations are in 2026
item.description: Valve's Steam Machine finally has a price: a whopping $1,049 for the 512GB configuration or $1,349 for the 2TB version. And those are without bundled controllers, which drive up the cost more. The prices are so high in part because Valve isn't subsidizing the hardware, and the company has already indicated that the component crisis […]

item.title: How to watch Norway vs Senegal: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere as Erling Haaland goes for more FIFA World Cup 2026 goals
item.description: Here's how to watch Norway vs Senegal for free online and from anywhere as Erling Haaland and Co. aim to make it two wins out of two at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Should you hold off on the Oura Ring 5 and get the Oura Ring 4 instead? Here's our verdict
item.description: The Oura Ring 5 is the latest flagship model, but can you find better value by going for the Oura Ring 4 instead?

item.title: I found the most powerful mini PC under $500 — and you won't see it in Amazon's Prime Day sale
item.description: If you're a creative professional or a developer, there's not much that can beat this mini PC (and yes, it even handles gaming).

item.title: The Instax Mini 12 is at a record-low price at Amazon right now — here's why I think it’s worth snapping up for the summer holidays
item.description: I rate the Instax Mini 12 as one of the best instant cameras around — and it's just hit a record-low at Amazon.

item.title: How to watch Norway vs. Senegal online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Norway vs. Senegal in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Which streaming services offer free trials in 2026?
item.description: A breakdown of every streaming service that offers a free trial in 2026, including Peacock, Prime Video, and more.

item.title: Disappointed by the Steam Machine’s official price? Build your own mini gaming PC instead with these deals
item.description: Starting at $1,049, the Steam Machine is an expensive bit of kit - but Prime Day deals means you could build your own mini PC for less.

item.title: The AI world is getting ‘loopy’
item.description: The loop takes agentic AI a step further by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.

item.title: I can’t put my Asus ROG Xbox Ally X down, and these are the accessories I’m looking to upgrade it with on Prime Day
item.description: Want to build the ultimate Asus ROG Xbox Ally setup before the PC handheld's inevitable price hike? I’ve got you covered...

item.title: Messi makes World Cup history — the internet reacts
item.description: Lionel Messi of Argentina scored his 17th and 18th World Cup goals, against Austria — days before his 39th birthday.

item.title: The 11 best gaming deals Id buy before Prime Day — Switch 2 bundles and Asus gaming laptops on sale
item.description: Save 30% on an Asus gaming laptop and 42% on a Samsung gaming monitor before Prime Day.

item.title: Prime Day 2026: Live updates on Apple, Samsung, DJI, Kindle, and more Amazon deals
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on AirPods, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: Walmart's rival Prime Day sale is live — here are 24 deals worth buying from Apple, Ninja, Samsung, Dyson, and more
item.description: Walmart's rival Prime Day sale is live, and I'm rounding up the 24 best deals that beat Amazon, including TVs, kitchen appliances, vacuums, Apple devices and more.

item.title: I ran a marathon with the Garmin Epix Pro (Gen 2), and now it's under £300 — I'd buy it over any Garmin at this price
item.description: The Garmin Epix Pro is actually the best value Garmin watch you can buy, thanks to a massive discount at watch & jewellery retailer H Samuel.

item.title: Microsoft and Chevron plan one of the largest gas-powered data center projects in US
item.description: Microsoft inked a 20-year power purchase agreement with Chevron, locking in decades of carbon emissions from a new natural gas power plant.

item.title: Meta Exposed Data Internally From Its Controversial Employee-Tracking Program
item.description: Employees had previously raised concerns about the initiative, which involves collecting workers’ keystroke data to train AI models.

item.title: My 12 favourite deals in Argos’ ‘Seize the sale’ event — save on 5-star TVs and coffee machines, plus discounts Dyson, Shark, Lego, Ninja and more
item.description: Fans, coffee machines, vacuum cleaners, air fryers, TVs, shavers and more get nice discounts to beat Amazon to the punch

item.title: Alibaba's AI video model rises to No. 2 in global rankings, as OpenAI's Sora and ByteDance's Seedance fall away
item.description: Alibaba Cloud on Sunday released HappyHorse 1.1, a major upgrade to its AI video generation model that the company says delivers production-ready video synthesis across core content creation scenarios. The model is now live on Alibaba Cloud Model Studio with full API access for enterprise customers and developers, accompanied by a 40% sitewide launch discount for the first two weeks.The release arrives at a moment of remarkable upheaval in the AI video generation market — and Alibaba appears keenly aware of the timing. OpenAI discontinued Sora after it proved financially unsustainable. ByteDan...

item.title: iOS 27 beta 2 is out now, here's what's new
item.description: Spoiler: It's more Siri stuff.

item.title: I've been scouring Amazon for discounts on its devices, but its selection of accessory deals is just as good — here are 7 early Prime Day deals on charging docks, speaker stands, and more
item.description: From smart speaker stands to charging docks, accessories are just as affordable as devices this Prime Day.

item.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
item.description: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.

item.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
item.description: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.
